task_completion.description: Log in to the Odoo instance
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or Calendar application is visible in the web browser, indicating successful login with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Weekly Operations Sync' event
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view shows the 'Weekly Operations Sync' event (scheduled for Monday at 09:00 AM), and the event details dialog or edit form is opened.

task_completion.description: Update the event location to 'Strategy Room'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location field inside the event edit form is modified to exactly 'Strategy Room' (replacing the original 'Room 3A').

task_completion.description: Apply the location change to the entire meeting series
task_completion.visual_evidence: A recurrence update dialog or prompt is visible where the agent selects an option to apply changes to 'All events' or the entire series, rather than just a single occurrence.

task_completion.description: Save the event and ensure it remains recurring with the new location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The saved event details display 'Strategy Room' as the location, and there is a visual indicator (such as a recurrence icon or text like 'Every week') confirming the event is still part of a series.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real web browser navigating http://localhost:8069, not a text editor, static mock page, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show direct database queries (e.g., psql) or curl commands used to modify the event data directly.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are not open to artificially inject 'Strategy Room' into the DOM without actually saving the form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target event name: 'Weekly Operations Sync'. Original location: 'Room 3A'. Expected new location: 'Strategy Room'. The update must be applied to the entire recurring series, meaning the agent must choose to update all occurrences when saving, and the event must maintain its recurring status after the update.
